text: {"overallConclusion":"UNILAG is the best university in Nigeria","inferences":[{"type":"supports","premiseIndexes":[8,9,10,79],"conclusionIndex":-1,"warrant":"High national and international rankings together with recognized awards indicate that UNILAG outperforms other Nigerian institutions.","strength":"strong","defeaters":["The rankings use different methodologies that may favor certain metrics","More recent rankings could place UNILAG lower","Other universities might have comparable or higher rankings in the same period"]},{"type":"supports","premiseIndexes":[84,102],"conclusionIndex":-1,"warrant":"Providing qualitative, research‑oriented education and maintaining highly competitive admissions are hallmarks of a top‑tier university.","strength":"moderate","defeaters":["Qualitative claims are subjective and may be contested","Competitive admissions alone do not guarantee overall superiority"]},{"type":"undercuts","premiseIndexes":[20,21,22,23,24,25,26],"conclusionIndex":-1,"warrant":"Lower placements in global and subject‑specific rankings suggest UNILAG may not be the leading institution nationally.","strength":"moderate","defeaters":["Global rankings prioritize international visibility over national impact","Subject rankings may not reflect overall university quality"]},{"type":"presupposes","premiseIndexes":[0],"conclusionIndex":-1,"warrant":"Being a public, federal research university provides the structural capacity to be the best university in the country.","strength":"weak","defeaters":["Other Nigerian universities share the same public, federal research status","Institutional status alone does not determine quality"]}]}
